flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Le Moyne-Owen College are 28% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($35.6k vs $49.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 20% at Le Moyne-Owen College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (571 vs 718).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Le Moyne-Owen College rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($24.8k → $28.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Le Moyne-Owen College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (52.9% → 47.2%).
